title: PPTX deck theme
description: Brand-level visual identity (colors, fonts, sizes, canvas). Per-project repos own a theme.json that conforms to this schema. The plugin ships exactly one neutral default. A theme carries ONLY look-and-feel — never chapter structure, slide order, or wording.

$comment.description: Optional free-text note (ignored by the engine).

margin.description: Outer safe-area margin (inches). House bar: 0.3 or 0.5+; neutral default 0.7.

font.description: Typeface tokens. One family is managed as a single token (house rule). Default Meiryo; Yu Gothic / Noto Sans JP also valid for Japanese.

family.description: Base/fallback face. Used for any weight role left unset.

heading.description: Heading face, rendered bold (e.g. 'Yu Gothic'). Falls back to family.

body.description: Body-copy face (e.g. 'Yu Gothic Medium' — medium reads better than regular for JP body). Falls back to family.

caption.description: Caption / footer / muted face (e.g. 'Yu Gothic' regular). Falls back to family.

colors.description: Palette. All values are 6-digit hex WITHOUT a leading '#'. House rule: one dominant color (60-70%) + one restrained accent.

darkAlt.description: Depth motif shape on dark (oval, not a stripe).

accentDeep.description: Darker accent for text on accent-tinted surfaces.

onAccentMuted.description: Muted text on a solid accent fill.

sizes.description: Type scale in points. Builders reference these tokens; they never hardcode point sizes.

message.description: Centered single-message statement; also CTA title.

sectionTitle.description: Optional. Section-divider title (pattern 'section'). Engine falls back to 36 if absent.

sectionIndex.description: Optional. Section-divider watermark index number (pattern 'section'). Engine falls back to 150 if absent.

statCard.description: Optional. Big value in a KPI card (pattern 'stat-grid'). Engine falls back to 40 if absent.

lead.description: Line-spacing multipliers by role (optional; engine falls back to sensible defaults). JP body wants air (1.5-1.7); headings want to be tight (1.05-1.12). §3 typography floor.

tight.description: Compact multi-line: bullets, sub-rows, offer body (~1.4).

layout.description: Optional composition knobs a design language can shift (M-6: layout is look-and-feel, so it lives in the theme, never the deck plan). Every knob defaults to the current geometry, so a theme without `layout` renders unchanged. Content box geometry is NOT touched — only card shape, the eyebrow marker, the cover motif, and the section-index side.

card.description: Card shape. Sharp + flat reads swiss/minimal; rounded + soft-shadow is the default.

kicker.description: Eyebrow marker: accent dot (default), a short rule, or none.

coverMotif.description: Cover depth shape: off-canvas oval (default) or none (austere).

sectionIndex.description: Section-divider ghost number side: right (default), left, or none.

brand.description: Optional brand chrome. The plugin's neutral default ships these empty so no brand identity is stored in the plugin (per-project repos fill them).

footerLabel.description: Text shown at bottom-left of body slides (usually the org name). A deck plan's meta.footerLabel overrides this.
